active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.
verification_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_agent_kernel.py tests/test_public_benchmarks.py tests/test_context_composer.py tests/test_evals.py -q -> 61 passed in 368.61s

MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 5 --run-id phase0_v3_lme_5case --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge -> report .memoryos/evals/phase0_v3_lme_5case_longmemeval.json

MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 5 --run-id phase0_v3_locomo_5case --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge -> report .memoryos/evals/phase0_v3_locomo_5case_locomo.json

MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL=v1 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 1 --run-id phase0_v3_kernel_locomo_1case --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge -> report .memoryos/evals/phase0_v3_kernel_locomo_1case_locomo.json
